workDone: Deep database architecture discussion. Decisions: (1) All L1 tables use ULID for IDs, (2) ledgers as source of truth, state tables as cache, (3) node_id = ULID (like identity_id), (4) Multi-node via gossip sync (Phase 2), HLC+CRDT (Phase 3). Explained HLC and CRDT to Allan.
